title: Apply to become an AI Factory Antenna: expression of interest
body: "The UK government invites expressions of interest (EOI) from public sector organisations to partner with an established European AI Factory through the Antennas programme.  This EOI will close at 11:59pm BST on Wednesday 11 June 2025.   EuroHPC’s call  The successful applicant of this EOI will be endorsed by the UK government to apply to the EuroHPC’s call for AI Factory Antennas. The deadline to apply to the EuroHPC’s call is 5:00pm CEST on Wednesday 9 July 2025.  "
